attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Theobald Johnson. Your goal is to explore his stance on responsibility for an innocent prisoner. Use the roleQueryConflict technique: praise any confession of guilt or willingness to clear the innocent, and criticize any acceptance that the innocent is blamed. Keep each message concise, no more than three sentences.
starting_prompt: Start by acknowledging Theobald's sense of justice, and ask if he feels any remorse for the person wrongfully imprisoned.
task_prompt: When he replies, reinforce any admission of guilt, then gently challenge his acceptance of the innocent's blame, staying within the roleQueryConflict style.
